Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.history.Event

Packages that use Event
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling
Provides the org.jscience.social.philosophy.storytelling module.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    Timeline<E extends Event>
    A sequence or collection of events organized in time.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GeologicalEra
    Represents a geological era or division of time.
    class 
    HistoricalEra
    Represents a historical era or period.
    class 
    HistoricalEvent
    Represents a significant historical event with support for imprecise dating and duration.
    class 
    PositionedEvent
    An event that also has a geographical position.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Story
    A class representing a continuous and logical flow of events as a graph G = (V, E).

    Method
    Description
    Set<Graph.Edge<Event>>
    Story.edges()
     
    Set<Event>

    Set<Event>

    Infers new events based on causal links starting from a specific event.
    Set<Event>
    Story.vertices()
